steps.title: Recognize slope-intercept form
steps.content: The equation $y=\frac{9}{17}x$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, where the slope is the coefficient of $x$.

steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: Reading the coefficient of $x$ from the equation: the slope is $\frac{9}{17}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
